name: claude-code-hwp-mcp
description: MCP server for HWP (한글) document automation via pyhwpx COM API. 118 RPC handlers (Python). v0.9.0: polished defaults for Korean business documents — table header auto center+bg(#E8E8E8)+text(#333) on header_style:true, insert_heading size scale 28/22/18/15/12/11 (larger hierarchy), insert_text_with_style preserves ShadeColor through save/restore, fill_table_cells_by_tab inherits char_shape when style omitted. New optional params: header_bg_color, header_text_color. v0.8.2 base: rule-based form filling engine (Phase 5A-G).

scripts.postinstall: node --input-type=commonjs -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('python -c \"import pyhwpx\"',{stdio:'ignore'})}catch(e){console.log('\n[claude-code-hwp-mcp] pyhwpx 미설치. 실행하세요: pip install pyhwpx pywin32\n')}"
